package rulecoverage

func PositiveMutexInLoop() string {
    ruleID := "mutex_in_loop"
    family := "concurrency"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Repeated Lock or RLock acquisition inside loops."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
